violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the back room was blocked by buckets in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Buckets were removed during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

Tile Flooring in (front) has grout that was observed to be in poor repair. Grout needs to be filled in. Tile flooring in back room is cracked and in poor repair. Floor shall be repaired so it is smooth. Area of Celling in back rook is constructed of wood and is open to space above. Celling shall be repaired with a material that is smooth, durable and easily cleanable. Left side wall in back room is lacking coving. Coving shall be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023
Refrigerator door gasket on low boy cold hold unit in (dairy) were observed repaired with tape. Gasket is in poor repair and needs to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the inside of lowboy cold hold unit, inside cabinets and floor behind waffle cone prep area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Areas needs to be cleaned on a more frequent basis. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023

Tile Flooring in (front) has grout that was observed to be in poor repair. Grout needs to be filled in. Tile flooring in back room is cracked and in poor repair. Floor shall be repaired so it is smooth. Area of Celling in back rook is constructed of wood and is open to space above. Celling shall be repaired with a material that is smooth, durable and easily cleanable. Left side wall in back room is lacking coving. Coving shall be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023
